methodology: RFC source field → MISMO XPath (pivot) → Encompass Field ID

source_system.name: RFC Proprietary LOS
source_system.internal_name_hypothesis: Click n Close (UNCONFIRMED — first question for RFC SME call)
source_system.type: In-house, undocumented. No vendor LOS. No written specs or MISMO docs.

destination_system.name: Encompass
destination_system.type: LOS / Carrington system of record post-acquisition
destination_system.note: Carrington CDM = Encompass data model. MISMO is the translation pivot between RFC and Encompass.

hard_blockers: DB schema / DDL dump (non-prod, read-only) — RFC eng/DBA
UCD XML samples (3-5 closed loans) — RFC closing/post-closing
next_priority: ULDD XML (if sells to GSEs) — RFC secondary/capital markets
DU and/or LPA casefile XML — RFC underwriting
Encompass field dictionary for target instance — Carrington Encompass admin
later: Servicing boarding / transfer file (iLAD 3.5) — RFC servicing
API contract (OpenAPI/Swagger or WSDL) — RFC eng
SME time with LOS builder/maintainer — 1-2 hrs
Live UI session trace (last resort) — Fiddler/Charles/Burp

open_flags: Confirm 'Click n Close' = RFC internal LOS name, and whether it is one system or a front end on something else
Confirm source DB engine (SQL Server vs Oracle) — determines catalog query to run
Define rep-credit-score selection rule before mapping that field
ARM sub-mapping block not yet built — defer until ARM loan sample arrives
iLAD 3.5 servicing block not yet expanded
Income: decide recompute vs store-and-carry for DTI
Identify doc engine (DocMagic / IDS / Docutech) before requesting payload
